payload.answer: I can help prepare options for recording this, but I won’t save or merge anything yet.
repair_options: Add as a separate new fact: “Nur and Sara are my twin daughters.”
If existing family facts mention Nur or Sara, keep both the existing facts and this new twin-daughters fact unless the user clarifies a conflict.
Ask for clarification if there is an existing contradictory or superseded record about Nur, Sara, or the user’s children.
